events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`: this is an under-torqued termination/splice, flagged by an IR thermal hot spot at the connection point (elevated contact resistance from insufficient clamping force). Given NEC 110.14's torque requirements, it's marked `fail`, high risk, with corrective actions (de-energize, re-terminate to spec torque, re-scan with IR to confirm resolution).
